channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tim Cook’s track record as Apple CEO is better than you’re giving him credit for
item.description: Last week, the Financial Times reported that Apple CEO Tim Cook may step down next year. This news seemed to have little impact on Apple’s stock price, but it certainly sparked conversations among Apple fans and armchair tech pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: New anti-Mamdani AI videos and the deepfake generation of astroturfing
item.description: A creepy account that’s almost certainly using AI to generate videos of imaginary New Yorkers criticizing mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani raises a frightening prospect: that deepfakes could be used not just to impersonate politicians, but also constituents.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: Is AI more appealing than crypto now? A major Bitcoin miner has decided to pivot to AI data centers - here's why
item.description: Bitfarm plans to abandon Bitcoin mining for AI data centers using existing energy capacity despite major losses and volatile markets.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: France will investigate Musk’s Grok chatbot after Holocaust denial claims
item.description: France's government is taking action against Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, after it generated posts questioning the use of gas chambers at Auschwitz.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Adamson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This AI app lets you chat with the dead using a few minutes of video – and not everyone is okay with that
item.description: 2wai's AI app can recreate deceased loved ones, leading to intense debate about whether digital resurrection is comforting or crossing a line.
item.dc:creator: Eric Hal Schwartz, TechRadar

item.title: Lanterns won't burn bright on HBO Max in early 2026 as DC comic book show suffers release window set-back
item.description: HBO has confirmed a big rumor about Lanterns' launch window – and it's not good news for Green Lantern fans.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Nestlé manages business processes with SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
item.description: With approximately 280,000 employees and sales of 91.4 billion Swiss francs (2024), Nestlé is one of the world’s largest food and beverage manufacturers. Well-known brands of the group include Maggi, the KitKat chocolate bar, and coffee specialties such as Nespresso and Nescafé.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Singin’ the Agentic Windows blues
item.description: Once upon a time, when you ran Windows on your desktop, it was your desktop. Oh, the IT department might have called the shots on how much you could do with it, but you could write what you needed to, and it was all kept nicely on your PC or your choice of network drive. Those days are long gone.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI and Taiwan's Foxconn to partner in AI hardware design and manufacturing in the US
item.description: OpenAI has announced a partnership with Taiwan's Foxconn to design and make equipment for AI data centers in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Chan Ho-Him And Taijing Wu, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Google’s Gemini 3 Pro: Better than mid
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Shopping for toys this holiday season? Avoid the AI ones, groups warn parents
item.description: They’re cute, even cuddly, and promise learning and companionship—but artificial intelligence toys are not safe for kids, according to children’s and consumer advocacy groups urging parents not to buy them during the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch Las Vegas Grand Prix 2025 F1: free streams, schedule, preview, Norris takes pole after wet qualifying, starting grid
item.description: All the ways to watch Las Vegas Grand Prix live streams online and from anywhere, as Lando Norris tries to extend his title lead in Sin City.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: F# 10 features scoped warning suppression
item.description: The newest version of Microsoft’s multi-paradigm language features a much-sought ability to suppress warnings in specified code sections.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Craigslist car report scam targets vehicle sellers
item.description: Fake buyers demand specific vehicle reports from unknown sites to steal credit card information from car sellers, but warning signs can help identify these scams before paying.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: More internet outages on the way? Google and Meta delay subsea cable plans due to sabotage fears
item.description: Red Sea instability holding back major subsea cable construction, forcing operators to seek new routes while increasing global congestion and outage risks.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Roblox bid for ad riches collides with wary sponsors, developers
item.description: Roblox Corp. executives have been trying to get advertisers to market their wares in the gaming platform’s virtual worlds since the company went public in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Improving annotation quality with machine learning
item.description: Data science and machine learning teams face a hidden productivity killer: annotation errors. Recent research from Apple analyzing production machine learning (ML) applications found annotation error rates averaging 10% across search relevance tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Gemini 3 may be the moment Google pulls away in the AI arms race
item.description: Google announced its widely anticipated Gemini 3 model Tuesday. By many key metrics, it appears to be more capable than the other big generative AI models on the market.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: From small business roots to mid-tier powerhouse, this firm is using employee ownership and AI to stay ahead in federal contracting
item.description: "I've got to show up every day changing hearts and minds, showing the innovation and showing how at the end of the day, it's actually better," Travis Mack said.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft Fabric IQ adds ‘semantic intelligence’ layer to Fabric
item.description: With Fabric IQ, Microsoft is adding new semantic intelligence capabilities to its unified data and analytics platform, Fabric, that it says will help enterprises maintain a common data model and automate operational decisions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A developer’s guide to avoiding the brambles
item.description: Software development is fraught with peril. For any development task, there are a million ways to do it wrong, and the one correct way is a small, narrow trail that winds quietly through the forest. It takes experience to know the path and to avoid the dangerous pitfalls along the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple’s macOS: AI for the rest of us
item.description: Apple is building the world’s best ecosystem for artificial intelligence. The Mac, supported by iPads and iPhones, ticks nearly every box for the inevitable future of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
